overview: Prioritized feature roadmap based on capability matrix and aspirational file audit. Features ranked by impact on self-compilation, WASM backend, and developer experience.

priority_levels.P0_blocker: Blocks self-compilation or WASM e2e pipeline
priority_levels.P1_high: Needed for full library compilation or WASM feature parity
priority_levels.P2_medium: Improves developer experience and code quality
priority_levels.P3_nice: Aspirational features for future Fusion releases

gaps.impact: Unblocks 7 aspirational .fu files (lexer_selfhost, main_selfhost, mem, parser_selfhost, vortex, hypercycle_suite)
gaps.approach: Add 'import' to bootstrap lexer/parser or convert aspirational files to mod/use syntax

gaps.impact: Enables idiomatic iteration patterns in self-hosted code
gaps.approach: Add 'for' token to lexer, desugar for-in to while loops

gaps.impact: Enables pattern matching in self-hosted compiler (used in pure_fusion_compiler.fu)
gaps.approach: Add 'match' token, pattern arms, exhaustiveness checking

gaps.impact: Enables Struct { field: value } syntax for struct construction
gaps.approach: Parse LBrace field: expr, ... RBrace as struct literal

gaps.impact: Enables [elem1, elem2, ...] syntax for array construction
gaps.approach: Parse LBracket expr, ... RBracket as array literal

gaps.impact: Enables |params| body closure syntax for functional patterns
gaps.approach: Parse pipe-delimited params + arrow + body, generate anonymous functions

gaps.impact: Enables parametric polymorphism (Vec<T>, Option<T>, Result<T, E>)
gaps.approach: Add type parameters to fn/struct, monomorphization pass

gaps.impact: Enables tagged unions and sum types
gaps.approach: Add enum keyword, variant parsing, discriminant generation
Implement ownership analysis, lifetime tracking, borrow rules

recommended_order: 1. import keyword (P0) — unblocks 7 files, highest impact/lowest effort
2. for loop + match (P1) — needed for idiomatic self-hosted code

current_state.wasm_e2e: All 4 .fu test files compile to valid WASM, 11 runtime tests pass
